title: cyclocodon axillaris
intro: Cyclocodon axillaris is a type of plant that belongs to the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the mint family. It is a perennial herb native to tropical regions of Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues and digestive problems. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in herbal preparations to relieve symptoms of coughs, colds, and fever, while also providing benefits for the digestive system by reducing inflammation and improving gut health. Herbal preparations of Cyclocodon axillaris include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties and health benefits.
